course_title: Business System Life Cycle and Project Management
description:
Offered: Spring
This hands-on course provides an introduction to the fundamental concepts and various techniques and tools required to successfully manage technology projects. Topics will include the systems development life cycle, with a particular focus on the planning phase. Students will develop project planning documents using multiple tools while investigating the different management styles and tactics used throughout the project’s life cycle.
Prerequisite(s): BSAD 1700 or CSC 1400
